instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML for model-based systems engineering, and architecture description languages such as ACME, AADL, MontiArc, and SysML IBDs for component & connector perspectives. These standards enable integration of heterogeneous stakeholders and perspectives within the Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) framework."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security measures include X.509 certificate-based mutual TLS authentication for Asset Administration Shell (AAS) components, role-based access control (RBAC) through AAS access control lists, TLS encryption for data in transit using MQTT (Mosquitto) and Thingsboard platforms, and JWT-based authentication for secure access management in Thingsboard."
]
